title: Flaky Crispy Canadian Beef Skewers
description: Buttery and crisp Canadian dish featuring full fat sour cream and bhuna, perfect as a hangover cure, made with halal-friendly ingredients and cooked on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together sour cream, bhuna spice blend, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the sour cream mixture.
Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the melted butter onto the beef strips.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8 minutes, turning occasionally.
Increase the heat to high and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve immediately.
